approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised foreign-currency-denominated intragroup receivable points to the recognised-item hedge model, which is one of the canonical IFRS hedge-accounting models relevant in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately contemplates hedge accounting for highly probable forecast intragroup foreign-currency transactions in consolidation, making the cash flow hedge model a peer top-level approach.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS also provides a distinct hedge-accounting model for foreign currency risk on net investments in foreign operations in consolidated financial statements, so it is a relevant peer top-level hedge model.
